text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the end of training one day, Special Week
comes to Maruzensky to learn how to cook.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why hello there, Spe! I'm so happy to see you,
but what brings you here all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Actually, Tazuna recently showed me a picture of
some food you made!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It looked soooo delicious, I couldn't get it out of
my mind...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I want to make wonderful dishes like that, too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, so that's it. Well, you certainly do
appreciate good food, Spe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, leave it to me. I'll drop some knowledge on
you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Now, what shall we make...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe a wholesome, filling soup that can be
made in a jiffy on a busy morning...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Or how about a slow-cooked, savory stew?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Those both sound amazing! I can't decide!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Why don't you decide, Trainer? I'll even let you have some when it's done! ♪
choice_data_list: A filling soup that can be made in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Why don't you decide, Trainer? I'll even let you have some when it's done! ♪
choice_data_list: A filling soup that can be made in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All righty, then! Let's learn to whip this thing up in
five minutes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: F-five minutes?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Add broth and water to the pot and then chop
the other ingredients before it comes to a boil!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All of them?! The carrots, onions, mushrooms, and celery?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It takes about two and a half minutes to boil, so
let's see those slice and dice skills!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh gosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon, the colorful vegetable soup is ready!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well done! You managed to do it within five
minutes! Great work, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay, I did it! And it smells so good!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I guess I've become a little like
Maruzensky now... ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Thanks, Spe! I feel like teaching you helped
me improve too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The quick soup that Maruzensky shows Special
Week ends up being very nutritious and tasty!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Right on! Let's cook a savory stew slowly over five
hours!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Five hours?! O-okay! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let it simmer ever so slowly over low heat. And
make sure to skim off any fat that bubbles up to
the top.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Slowly... Ever so slowly... I'm getting pretty
hungry.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! You have to resist the temptation to turn
up the heat. A delicious stew can't be rushed!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, it smells so good! Isn't it almost ready?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, it is about time! ♪ Now that everything's been cooked, switch pots and add water and seasonings...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Then put the lid on and let it simmer for another
two hours!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Two more hours?! I can't wait that long!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, the flavors mix and deepen, and the
scrumptious stew is ready!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mmm! It smells so good! I wanna eat it right now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I don't think I can resist any longer,
myself. Let's chow down! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The slow stew that Maruzensky shows Special
Week ends up being luscious and full of flavor!
